name: Bincom Hackathon September 2026
subtitle: Building the Next Big Thing with generative AI in 24 Hours or Less.
welcome_email_template:
Hello {{name}},

Thank you for registering for the Bincom Hackathon as a {{role}}!

Here are your essential onboarding links:

  • WhatsApp Group: {{whatsapp_link}}
  • Slack Channel: {{slack_link}}
  • Kick-off Event: {{kickoff_event_link}}

The hackathon starts on {{start_date}} and ends on {{end_date}}.

Get ready to hack!
reminderEmailSubject: Reminder: Bincom Hackathon starts in {{days}} days!
reminder_email_template:
Hello {{name}},

This is a quick reminder that the Bincom Hackathon is starting in exactly {{days}} days!

Here are your essential onboarding links to prepare:

  • WhatsApp Group: {{whatsapp_link}}
  • Slack Channel: {{slack_link}}
  • Kick-off Event: {{kickoff_event_link}}

Start Date: {{start_date}}

Get ready to hack!

timeline.title: virtual kick-off event
timeline.description: The Bincom Hackathon virtual kick-off event is designed to answer all your hackathon questions and officially kick start the 24 hours event.

timeline.title: Team Registration Virtual Check-In Event
timeline.description: designed to resolve issues relating to team registration.

timeline.title: Team Registration Deadline
timeline.description: All Teams must ensure they complete the team registration form.

timeline.title: Product Submission Virtual Check-In Event
timeline.description: designed to ensure all teams submit their products before deadline

timeline.title: Product Submission Deadline
timeline.description: All Products developed during the Hackathon must be submitted.

timeline.title: Community Judges - Feedback Submission
timeline.date: Saturday, September 19th - Monday, September 21st, 2026 (7:00 PM WAT)
timeline.description: All Community Judges must submit their feedback. Judges will be contacted with specific instructions.

timeline.title: Public Voting & Feedback
timeline.description: Public voting session where projects receive peer review and feedback on our social platforms.

timeline.title: Team Presentation to Expert Judges (Optional)
timeline.description: The top 5 teams will present and demo their innovations to our expert panel of judges.

timeline.title: Hackathon Winner 🏆 Announcement
timeline.description: Grand announcement of the winning team and the first and second runner up teams
